Custom Canning Labels

Premium Waterproof Labels for Jars, Pantry & Food Storage

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Your Custom Labels Now - Upload Your Artwork or Design Online Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Custom Canning Labels for Kitchen Organization

Transform your home canning and food storage with professional-grade custom canning labels from Decals.com. Perfect for mason jars, pantry organization, farmers market products, and homemade goods, our waterproof vinyl labels combine durability with beautiful custom designs that make your preserved foods look professionally branded. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Whether you're organizing your home pantry, selling at farmers markets, or creating memorable gifts, our canning labels feature vibrant full-color printing on premium vinyl material that resists moisture, oils, and temperature changes. Choose from multiple sizes and cutting options to perfectly fit your jars and containers.

Our easy-to-use online design system lets you create personalized labels with your own text, images, and colors, or upload your professionally designed artwork. With production times as fast as one business day and free proofing on every order, you can have custom canning labels ready when you need them.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Your Custom Canning Labels

Design Process

Create your custom canning labels using our intuitive online designer or upload your own print-ready files. Our design system allows you to add text, images, and choose colors to match your brand or personal style. You can also select from our extensive clipart library to enhance your canning label designs with decorative elements perfect for homemade preserves and pantry organization.

For customers who prefer to upload original artwork, we accept EPS files to ensure the highest quality output for your canning labels. This ensures crisp text and vibrant colors that will make your jars stand out whether they're in your pantry or at a farmers market display.

Payment

All custom canning labels require full payment before production begins. We accept all major credit cards including VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Personal and business checks are also accepted, though they must clear before your canning labels enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your canning label order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your order progress through every stage of production, from artwork approval to shipping preparation. Simply click the tracking link in your email to get real-time updates on your custom canning labels.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Canning Label Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule offers multiple turnaround options for your custom canning labels, ranging from one to five business days. This allows you to choose the timeline that best fits your project needs, whether you're preparing for canning season or need labels for an upcoming farmers market.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Perfect for urgent canning label needs, our priority production gets your labels manufactured in just one business day. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available in special circumstances - contact our customer service team to discuss your specific timeline requirements.

2 Business Days Express Production

Our express production option provides a perfect balance of speed and value for custom canning labels. This timeline works well for most home canning projects and small business needs. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will start production the next business day.

3 Business Days Standard Production

This is our most popular production timeline for canning labels, offering excellent turnaround speed at no additional cost. Standard production provides ample time for quality control while still delivering your custom labels quickly for most canning and pantry organization projects.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose our saver production option when you have flexibility in your timeline and want to maximize your budget. This option is ideal for large batches of canning labels or seasonal projects where you can plan ahead for the best value.

Important Note: Production time begins when your artwork is approved and payment is processed. This production timeline is separate from shipping time. If your order requires a proof review or our prepress team flags any artwork issues, the production clock starts when you provide final approval.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for Custom Canning Labels

Understanding the difference between die-cut and kiss-cut options helps you choose the best finishing method for your canning labels. The main difference lies in how we cut through the materials and what backing remains with your finished labels.

Die-Cut Canning Labels

Die-cut canning labels are precision-cut through both the vinyl label material and the paper backing, creating individually separated labels with no excess material around the edges. Think of this like a cookie cutter approach - each label is completely cut out to match your exact design contour.

This cutting method works exceptionally well for canning labels because it creates a clean, professional appearance on curved jar surfaces. Die-cut labels conform better to round mason jars and provide a seamless look that's perfect for farmers market products or gift presentations.

Please note: Back Slit (Crack and Peel) feature is available on Standard and Permanent material options for easier label removal.

Kiss-Cut Canning Labels

Kiss-cut canning labels are cut only through the top vinyl layer, leaving the paper backing intact around your label design. This creates a border of backing material that makes the labels easier to peel and apply to your jars.

The kiss-cut method is ideal for canning labels when you're applying many labels in sequence, such as during large canning sessions or when labeling inventory for farmers market sales. The extra backing material provides a convenient grip for faster label application.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Canning Label Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your custom canning labels print with crisp text, vibrant colors, and professional quality that will make your jars look their best. Follow these guidelines to achieve optimal results for your canning label designs.

Preferred File Types

For the highest quality canning labels, submit vector-based files whenever possible. Our preferred formats include Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript) and PDF files. When using these formats, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure your text prints exactly as designed without font substitution issues.

Vector files are ideal for canning labels because they maintain sharp edges and crisp text at any size, ensuring your product names, dates, and ingredient lists remain perfectly readable on finished labels.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution raster files including JPG, TIFF, and PNG formats. These work well for canning labels that incorporate photographs of your products or detailed illustrations. Ensure raster files meet our resolution requirements for best printing results.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up your canning label artwork at the exact proportional size you're ordering. Convert all text elements to outlines to prevent font issues. Include bleed areas only when necessary for full-coverage background colors or images that extend to the label edges.

For canning labels with specific cutting requirements, clearly indicate cut lines in your artwork. This ensures precise cutting that matches your intended design, especially important for uniquely shaped labels or those with decorative borders.

Resolution Requirements

Submit raster images at 100% scale with 100 DPI minimum resolution, or proportionally higher resolution for smaller scale submissions. High-resolution artwork ensures your canning labels print with sharp detail and vibrant colors that will make your preserved goods look professionally packaged.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Your Custom Canning Labels

We offer multiple shipping options to get your custom canning labels delivered when and where you need them. Understanding our shipping methods and timelines helps you plan your canning projects and ensures your labels arrive in time for your preservation schedule.

Available Shipping Methods

Choose from economy ground shipping for cost-effective delivery, or select expedited options when you need your canning labels faster. We work with trusted carriers to ensure your labels arrive in perfect condition, protected from moisture and damage during transit.

Priority shipping options are available for urgent canning label orders, especially useful during peak canning season when timing is critical for your food preservation projects or farmers market preparation.

Shipping Timeline Expectations

Remember that shipping time is separate from production time. Your total timeline includes both the production period (1-5 business days depending on your selection) plus the shipping duration. Plan accordingly when you have specific deadlines for canning projects or market events.

We'll provide tracking information once your canning labels ship, allowing you to monitor delivery progress and plan your labeling schedule. Most orders ship within one business day after production completion.

Important Shipping Considerations

Economy shipping may have longer transit times, so factor this into your canning schedule. For time-sensitive canning label orders, we recommend combining faster production options with expedited shipping to ensure timely delivery.

International shipping is available for canning labels, though additional customs processing time may apply. Contact our customer service team for specific international delivery estimates and requirements.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Applying Custom Canning Labels

Proper application technique ensures your custom canning labels adhere smoothly and maintain their professional appearance throughout storage and use. Follow these steps for best results when labeling your jars and containers.

Preparing the Jar Surface

Clean your jars thoroughly with soap and water, then dry completely before applying canning labels. Remove any existing adhesive residue or oil fingerprints that could prevent proper adhesion. For best results, allow jars to reach room temperature before label application.

Glass mason jars provide an ideal surface for canning labels, but ensure the surface is completely smooth and free from condensation. Even small amounts of moisture can prevent proper adhesion and cause label edges to lift over time.

Applying Your Canning Labels

Peel the label from its backing, starting from one corner. Position the label carefully on your jar, as repositioning may reduce adhesive strength. Apply firm, even pressure across the entire label surface, working from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles.

For curved mason jar surfaces, apply labels slowly and smooth as you go to ensure the vinyl conforms properly to the jar contour. Take extra care around jar shoulders and curved areas where the label needs to flex.

Finishing and Storage Tips

After applying canning labels, avoid handling the labeled jars for several hours to allow the adhesive to achieve full bond strength. Store labeled jars in cool, dry conditions when possible to maximize label lifespan.

Our waterproof canning labels resist moisture and temperature changes, making them suitable for refrigerated storage and pantry conditions. However, extreme temperature fluctuations may affect adhesive performance over extended periods.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Canning Labels?

Canning labels are waterproof vinyl labels specifically designed for food storage containers, mason jars, and preserved goods packaging. Made from durable vinyl material with strong adhesive backing, these labels resist moisture, oils, and temperature changes commonly encountered in kitchen and pantry environments. Canning labels are commonly used for homemade preserves, farmers market products, pantry organization, and commercial food packaging, applied directly to glass jars, plastic containers, and metal cans to provide clear product identification and professional presentation.

Design Your Perfect Canning Labels Today

Ready to organize your pantry and showcase your homemade preserves with professional-quality custom labels? Our online design system makes it easy to create personalized canning labels that reflect your style and meet your specific needs. Whether you're a home canning enthusiast, farmers market vendor, or small food business, we have the tools and expertise to bring your labeling vision to life.

Upload your own designs or use our intuitive design interface to create custom canning labels with your choice of colors, fonts, and images. With fast production times, competitive pricing, and guaranteed quality, Decals.com is your trusted partner for all your custom paper roll labels and specialty labeling needs.

Start designing your custom canning labels now and discover why thousands of customers trust Decals.com for their labeling solutions. From concept to delivery, we're here to help you create labels that make your products stand out and keep your kitchen perfectly organized.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Canning Label FAQs

What material are canning labels made from?

Our canning labels are made from premium vinyl material with a strong adhesive backing designed for kitchen and food storage environments. The vinyl construction provides excellent resistance to moisture, oils, and temperature changes commonly found in pantries and refrigerated storage, ensuring your labels maintain their appearance and adhesion throughout the life of your preserved goods.

How long do canning labels last on mason jars?

When properly applied to clean, dry surfaces, our canning labels typically last 2-3 years in normal pantry storage conditions. Labels stored in refrigerated environments may last even longer due to reduced temperature fluctuations. The actual lifespan depends on storage conditions, handling frequency, and exposure to moisture or temperature extremes.

Can I use canning labels for freezer storage?

Yes, our vinyl canning labels perform well in freezer conditions and will maintain adhesion at temperatures down to 0°F (-18°C). However, we recommend applying labels at room temperature before placing containers in the freezer, as cold application may reduce initial adhesive bond strength.

What's the difference between die-cut and kiss-cut canning labels?

Die-cut canning labels are completely cut through both the vinyl and backing material, creating individual labels with no excess material around the edges. Kiss-cut labels are cut only through the vinyl layer, leaving a paper backing border that makes them easier to peel and apply during high-volume labeling sessions.

Do you offer waterproof canning labels?

All our canning labels are naturally waterproof due to their vinyl construction and marine-grade adhesive. They resist moisture from condensation, spills, and humid storage conditions, making them ideal for both pantry storage and refrigerated environments where condensation is common.

What artwork format works best for canning labels?

Vector files in EPS or PDF format provide the highest quality results for canning labels, especially for designs with text and simple graphics. High-resolution JPG, PNG, or TIFF files work well for photographic elements. Ensure all text is converted to outlines in vector files to prevent font substitution issues during printing.

Can I get custom shapes for my canning labels?

Yes, we can die-cut canning labels to custom shapes that match your design requirements. Custom shapes work particularly well for specialty products or when you want your labels to follow the contour of decorative elements in your design. Contact our design team to discuss your specific shape requirements.

How should I store unused canning labels?

Store unused canning labels in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources. Keep them in their original packaging or a sealed container to prevent dust accumulation and maintain adhesive quality. Properly stored labels typically maintain their quality for 1-2 years.
